title.en: The fall of a high-level demon seed is naturall...

content.en:
The fall of a high-level demon seed is naturally not a trivial matter.

Soon, other high-level demon species came here, but Ye Tian could no longer be found.

......

"There are really a lot of treasures on this high-level demon seed, much higher than the net worth of the high-level demon seed I killed last time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It's normal to think about it.

This high-level demon seed has been killing in this Dongwu Realm Crack Realm, and how many resources it has collected is naturally not comparable to other ordinary high-level demon species.

It is estimated that in the abyss of demon seeds, not all high-level demon seeds are qualified to enter the realm of the rift.

In the following days, Ye Tian attacked and killed several high-level demon species, but he did not slaughter high-level demon seeds frantically.

With his current strength, there is no need to kill too many high-level demon seeds in the Gap Realm of the Eastern Black Realm, and he will only be targeted by those high-level demon seeds in "Five Seven Zero", so he will be besieged.

Once his strength is exposed, those top forces in the Eastern Ukraine Realm will also target him.

And weaken the strength of the demon seeds, and the top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm will have no pressure, and they may drive out the powerful realm gods.

When the time comes, he will also be driven away.

He doesn't want to leave the East Black Realm now, there are too many resources here, and he still wants to get a lot of resources!

"Hey, what is this?"

Ye Tian found an item, this item was a black leaf, but it was not a normal leaf, because its mass was extremely hard, more like some kind of indestructible metal, and its texture was even no less than that of Heavenly Vein Demon Gold.

Moreover, that high-level demon seed was not just this black leaf, but more than a dozen, which was kept inside a box and sealed, which was obviously very precious.

Due to the high grade of this item, he could not identify this item even if he identified the treasure.

But one thing is certain, and that is that this treasure will turn the Eternal Dao Seed into a demon.

He just touched it, and the breath on this black leaf tried to pour into his Eternal Dao Seed, thus demonizing his Eternal Dao Seed.

Of course.

Ye Tian would have been able to do it if he had blocked this aura, but he hadn't done it, after all, he wasn't afraid that the Eternal Dao Seed would be transformed into a demon seed.

......

In the ancient city of the boundary of the East Wu Boundary.

Ye Tian saw a high-level realm god, this high-level realm god specializes in identifying all kinds of treasures, and also acquires all kinds of treasure resources, but he doesn't need ordinary resources.

This high-level realm god is named Zuo Xu Realm God, and he is a high-level realm god of the top power Taihe Holy Sect.

After Ye Tian saw Zuo Xu's Realm God, he took out a black leaf and handed it to him for identification.

Of course, he sealed this leaf to prevent the aura from escaping, and turned the eternal Dao seed of other realm gods into a demon seed, in that case, the top forces would trouble him and even attack him.

When Zuo Xu Realm God saw this leaf, his face immediately changed, and he immediately said solemnly: "Where did you get this thing?"

"Obtained from a demon seed!"

Ye Tian explained.

"That's right, only the demon seed has this kind of thing!" Zuo Xu Realm God said: "The appraisal fee for this thing is 10,000 Eternal Boundary Stones, isn't it expensive?"

"It's not expensive!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

Although 10,000 Eternal Boundary Stones are a huge wealth for powerful forces, they are really nothing in the eyes of top forces.

Find other high-level realm gods to identify, and there is a high probability that it will not be lower than this price.

Besides, he had already come to Zuo Xu Realm God for identification, and it was not good to find other high-level realm gods.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian paid 10,000 Eternal Boundary Stones and handed them over to the Zuoxu Realm God.

At this time, Zuo Xu Realm God directly said the result: "This black leaf is actually not a leaf, but a rare material - Black Leaf Demon Gold, this kind of thing is useless to us, it will only make our Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, even I, I don't dare to carry the Black Leaf Demon Gold for a long time, let alone let it touch the Eternal Dao Seed." But for high-level demon seeds, the effect of Black Leaf Demon Gold is very good, it can temper the eternal demon seed. However, the Black Leaf Demon Gold was originally in the process of trying to transform the Eternal Dao Seed into an Eternal Dao Seed, and quickly refining the Eternal Dao Seed. If it is an eternal demon seed, the effect will naturally not be too good, but it will not be very bad either. If you wear Black Leaf Magic Gold for a long time, the effect is also okay 0 ....."

"What should I do if I use the Black Leaf Demon Gold to refine the Eternal Dao Seed?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

He tried to put this thing into the Eternal Dao Seed, but it didn't have the effect of refining the Eternal Dao Seed, otherwise he wouldn't have come to Zuo Xu Realm God for identification.

"Could it be that you still want to use it to refine the Eternal Dao Seed?Do you want to turn into a Demon Seed?" Zuo Xu Realm God was surprised, but after receiving the Eternal Realm Stone, he still replied carefully: "The Black Leaf Demon Gold is different from other resources, putting it into the Eternal Dao Seed will only make the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, and it is impossible to refine it to a little Eternal Dao Seed." The normal usage is to use a special secret method to extract a trace of the origin of the Black Leaf Demon Gold and introduce the Eternal Dao Seed or the Eternal Demon Seed, so as to achieve the effect of tempering. Also, don't ask me what the secret method is, I don't know, and no high-level realm god will study this. "

"Understood, Left Realm God!"

Ye Tian took his leave.

After Ye Tian left, Zuo Xu Realm God shook his head, "Another mid-level realm god who wants to quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed will turn into a demon seed sooner or later!"

......

"It turns out that a secret method is needed to absorb the origin energy in the Black Leaf Demon Gold!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

He even suspected that the high-level demon species he had killed before might not have that kind of secret method, or that kind of secret method, but he hadn't had time to refine these Black Leaf Demon Gold.

5.0 He wanted to get the secret method from the demon seed, which was impossible.

Therefore, he had to rely on his own research to create this secret method.

"You have to send the Black Leaf Demon Gold out, and then study it again and again. "

Ye Tian decided.

Soon.

He went out again and sent the resources and Black Leaf Demon Gold he had obtained this time back to the Terran Holy Kingdom.

Conducted by the replica body of the Terran Holy Kingdom, he firmly believed that if he researched and created countless times, he would definitely be able to create such a secret method, so as to use the Black Leaf Demon Gold to refine his Eternal Dao Seed.

If he could quickly refine his Eternal Dao Seed, then he would find a way to collect more Black Leaf Demon Gold.

Unconsciously, the years of the 10 billion solstice era have passed.
